title: A narrow correction for ion-beam mirror jitter in one optics geometry
abstract: We derive a narrow correction for ion-beam mirror jitter in one optics geometry and show improved stability in one validated operating window relative to the standard mirror model.
manuscript_text: We derive the correction for one optics geometry. Equation 1 defines the correction, Table 1 reports stability relative to the standard model, and Figure 1 shows the validated operating window. The contribution is intentionally narrow and should not be generalized outside the tested geometry.
figures_and_captions: Figure 1. Validated operating window for the tested optics geometry.
tables: Table 1. Stability comparison between the standard model and the correction.
supplement_or_appendix: Appendix A lists the geometry constants and derivation details.
data_availability: Validation traces are archived with the appendix.
code_availability: Derivation scripts are archived with the appendix.
materials_availability: Geometry constants are included in the appendix.
ethics_and_disclosures: The authors declare no competing interests.
